## Record

Paste the case URL or title.

## Suggested correction

What should change?

## Official source

Paste the official `war.gov`, DVIDS, or other official-source URL that supports the correction.

## Notes

Do not use unofficial sources as case facts unless a maintainer explicitly approves a new source class.
